plugin_desc: Hirschmann industrial switch SNMP collection (HMPRIV-MGMT-SNMP-MIB, IANA PEN 248). Beyond standard IF-MIB interface metrics, it collects Hirschmann private OIDs for device health: CPU utilisation (hmCpuUtilization, reported directly as a percentage), main memory (hmMemoryAllocated used + hmMemoryFree in KB, usage derived as used/(used+free)), chassis temperature (hmTemperature in degrees Celsius) and power-supply state (hmPSState, normalised to 1=normal / 2=abnormal). No dedicated fan-state OID is exposed, so fan is N/A. Supported brands/models — Hirschmann (Belden) industrial managed switches (RS20/RS30/RS40, MACH/MICE/GREYHOUND/EAGLE series; enterprise 248).
name: Switch

metrics.name: device_cpu_usage
metrics.description: CPU utilisation of the Hirschmann switch (HMPRIV-MGMT-SNMP-MIB hmCpuUtilization).

metrics.name: interface_ifHCInOctets
metrics.description: This metric indicates the average rate of bytes received over the past 5 minutes, measured in bytes per second, from the 64-bit IF-MIB ifHCInOctets counter (ifXTable).

metrics.name: interface_ifHCOutOctets
metrics.description: This metric calculates the average rate of bytes sent over the past 5 minutes, measured in bytes per second, from the 64-bit IF-MIB ifHCOutOctets counter (ifXTable).

metrics.name: device_memory_used
metrics.description: Used memory of the Hirschmann switch in bytes (hmMemoryAllocated, KB*1024).

metrics.name: device_memory_usage
metrics.description: Memory utilisation of the Hirschmann switch, derived as used/(used+free).

metrics.name: device_temperature_celsius
metrics.description: Chassis temperature of the Hirschmann switch in degrees Celsius (hmTemperature).

metrics.name: device_psu_state
metrics.description: Power-supply state of the Hirschmann switch (hmPSState), normalised to 1=normal / 2=abnormal.
